goal: Produce a system-planning endorsement document from a producer/planner perspective, covering frontend/backend responsibility split, XMind-style system design structure, Axure wireframe output plan, UI requirement specification, and competitor decomposition with adaptation strategy.
constraints: Document must be actionable for production workflow (not only conceptual).
Use this project context (card battle + collection + story) as the anchor scenario.
Include explicit sections: design purpose, function overview, system rules, red-dot rules, UI rules.
Do not delete or revert unrelated in-progress local/staged changes.
deliverables: One planning endorsement document under docs/project with concrete templates and project-adapted examples.
Workflow-ready checklists for system planning, Axure output, UI requirement handoff, and competitor adaptation.
